expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with at least 5 user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Task Statuses",
  "branchName": "task-statuses",
  "description": "Add task statuses for tasks.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add task status schema",
      "description": "As a user, I want each task to store a status so that work can be tracked as pending, in progress, or done.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Tasks have a persisted status field with allowed values pending, in progress, and done",
        "Existing tasks default to pending",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Update task status backend action",
      "description": "As a user, I want task status changes to persist so that updates survive reloads.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Updating a task status persists the selected value",
        "Invalid status values are rejected",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Show task status badge on task cards",
      "description": "As a user, I want to see each task status on its card so that I can scan progress quickly.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task cards display the current status badge",
        "Badge reflects the stored task status",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add task status control to task rows",
      "description": "As a user, I want to change status from each task row so that I can update work inline.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Each task row exposes a status control",
        "Changing the control updates the selected task status",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Filter tasks by status",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter the task list by status so that I can focus on specific work states.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "The task list can filter by status",
        "Filter results show only tasks with the selected status",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}
